free_text: -TOTAL CROSS-SECTION OF NEUTRONS ON MG, CL, K IN THE
ENERGY RANGE COVERED 5 TO 8.5 MEV IN STEPS OF 25 KEV,
WITH A RESOLUTION OF ABOUT 30 KEV.
PERFORMED IN TERMS OF INTERMEDIATE STRUCTURE.
STATISTICAL ERROR 1 TO 2 PERCENT.(2 PC GIVEN IN DATA).
THE MULTIPLE SCATTERING WAS CORRECTED BY A MONTE
